name: ACCO Brands Corporation
description: ACCO Brands Corporation is one of the world's largest designers, marketers and manufacturers of branded academic, consumer and business products. The company's widely recognized brands include Artline, AT-A-GLANCE, Barrilito, Derwent, Esselte, Five Star, Foroni, GBC, Hilroy, Kensington, Leitz, Mead, Quartet, Rapid, Rexel, Swingline, Tilibra and TruSens. ACCO Brands products are sold in more than 100 countries around the world.
